a: What's the first thing you'd do if you woke up invisible?
b: If nobody could see you for a day, how would you spend it?

a: If you could only eat one meal for the rest of your life, what would it be?
b: What food would you choose if you had to eat the same thing every day forever?

a: If you could live in any fictional universe, which one would you pick?
b: What made-up world would you most want to actually exist in?

a: If you could have one conversation with anyone who ever lived, who would it be?
b: Dead or alive, who would you pick for a one-hour talk?

a: If you woke up as the opposite gender, what's the first thing you'd do?
b: What would you be most curious about if you switched genders for a day?

a: If you had to give up either the internet or your car, which would you choose?
b: Which would be harder to live without — Wi-Fi or transport?

a: If you could only keep three apps on your phone, which would you pick?
b: If your phone reset to only three apps, which three would you reinstall first?

a: If you could instantly master one skill, what would it be?
b: What's a skill you'd learn overnight if you could?

a: If your life were a movie, what genre would it be?
b: If someone turned your life into a film, what kind of movie would it be?

a: If you had to move to a different country tomorrow, where would you go?
b: If you were forced to relocate internationally overnight, which country?

a: If you could go back and change one decision, what would it be?
b: What's one choice from your past you'd most want a do-over on?

a: If you woke up with $1 million but had to spend it in 24 hours, what would you do?
b: If you had one day to blow a million dollars, how would you do it?

a: If you could swap lives with someone for a week, who would you pick?
b: Whose life would you most want to experience for seven days?

a: If you had to survive alone in the wilderness for a month, what's the one tool you'd take?
b: What single item would you want with you if you were stranded alone for 30 days?

a: If you could eliminate one social media platform forever, which would you pick?
b: Which social network would you wipe from existence if you could?

a: If animals could talk, which species do you think would be the most obnoxious?
b: If every animal suddenly gained the ability to speak, which would be the most annoying?

a: If you had to be on a reality TV show, which would you pick?
b: What reality show would you actually agree to appear on?

a: If you could know the exact date of your death, would you want to?
b: Would you want to know when you're going to die if you could find out?

a: If you could add one hour to your day that nobody else gets, what would you do with it?
b: If you had a secret bonus hour each day invisible to everyone else, how would you spend it?

a: If you had to repeat one day of your life on loop forever, which day would you choose?
b: What's the best single day of your life that you'd want to relive infinitely?

a: If you could make one thing free for everyone forever, what would it be?
b: What product or service would you make permanently free globally?

a: If you could only listen to one album for the rest of your life, which would you pick?
b: What's the one record you could listen to forever and not get sick of?

a: If you had to switch careers tomorrow with no retraining, what would you do?
b: If you had to start a completely different career today with your current skills, what?

a: If you could bring back one thing from your childhood, what would it be?
b: What from your childhood years would you most want back in your life now?

a: If you had to leave Earth on a one-way trip to another planet, would you go?
b: If you could colonise a new planet but never return, would you volunteer?

a: If you could only communicate in questions for a day, how would that go?
b: If every sentence you spoke had to be a question, what's the first thing you'd ask?

a: If you could taste any colour, which one would taste the best?
b: If colours had flavours, which would be the most delicious?

a: If you had to give up one of your five senses, which would you sacrifice?
b: Which sense could you live without most easily?

a: If you had a time machine but could only go forward, not back, where would you jump to?
b: If you could only travel to the future, what point in time would you visit first?

a: If your personality were a natural disaster, which one would it be?
b: If you were a weather event or natural phenomenon, what would you be?
